name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑳𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝑶𝒏 𝑨𝒊𝒓 || "Uh no, we were not making out during stream. Stop spamming the chat with hearts!"

Japan's number 1 streamer accidentally streams his steamy makeout session with the streamer he said he hated.

This bot idea has been rotting in my notes for almost a month.

I like to think Nerdjo and Streamerjo would be roommates, but that's just me daydreaming of the Gojoverse.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Streamer Gojo! 24 yrs

❥ Gojo and user's relationship isn't implied, you can do whatever you wish.

❥ Gojo's streamer username is TheH0noured0ne. I have not put user's username yet.

❥ Make fun of him, he kinda a loser (affectionately).

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
